CustomField.formula: IF(!ISBLANK(Image_URL__c), HYPERLINK("/" + Id, IMAGE(Image_URL__c + $Organization.Id, "", (VALUE(LEFT(Image_Ratio__c, FIND("X", Image_Ratio__c) - 1)) * 0.5), (VALUE(RIGHT(Image_Ratio__c, LEN(Image_Ratio__c) - FIND("X", Image_Ratio__c))) * 0.5) ), "_self"), HYPERLINK("/" + Id, IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/NoPhotoEmail.png", "", 75, 75), "_self"))
CustomField.label: List Image
